title: dialium holtzii
intro: Dialium holtzii, also known as the African walnut or African walnut tree, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Dialium holtzii lie in its bark and seeds, which contain bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of using Dialium holtzii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Dialium holtzii is used in various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tonics, to harness its medicinal properties.
